Video.summary: The holdup-proof safe in Gus Lammerson's store proves anything but.
Video.title: The Holdup-Proof Safe

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: A lawyer who has turned to the bottle is ostracized when he refuses to help a miner.
Video.title: Justice at Jackson Creek

Video.summary: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.
Video.title: The Unshakable Man

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: Lawmen Pete Gabriel and Joe Phy were friends, then Kitty Bolton came along.
Video.title: Loss of Faith

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: A Native acquitted of murder under Sioux law must contend with the white man's 'lynch law' justice.
Video.title: With Honesty and Integrity

Video.summary: A retiring Arizona ranger chases one last crook.
Video.title: Measure of a Man

Video.summary: An attorney takes the case of a famed gunman who is charged with murder.
Video.title: Diamond Field Jack

Video.summary: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.
Video.title: The Man Who Died Twice

Video.summary: Bill Franklin stumbles upon a rich gold vein and names it after his wife.
Video.title: The Holy Terror

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: A down-and-out cowboy pines after a wealthy rancher's daughter.
Video.title: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Image.alt: See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl
See the Elephant and Hear the Owl

Video.summary: A man's resemblance to a killer lands him in jail and facing a murder charge.
Video.title: Alias James Stuart

Video.summary: A man who claims he can resurrect the dead poses a problem for killer Bill Groat.
Video.title: Miracle at Boot Hill

Video.summary: The story of Wyatt, Virgil, Morgan Earp and Doc Holliday after their gunfight with outlaws.
Video.title: After the O.K. Corral

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: A missionary puts himself on the line to mediate a conflict between settlers and Navajo.
Video.title: The Peacemaker

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A lawman must choose between love and duty in the midst of a missing persons case.
Video.title: There Was Another Dalton Brother

Video.summary: A lawyer (Ronald Reagan) sues a man who killed a boy's dog.
Video.title: Tribute to the Dog

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.
Video.title: Paid in Full

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: A mail delivery rider attempts to help a widow find the right man to marry.
Video.title: The Rider

Video.summary: A Quaker farmer undertakes a journey out west with apple-tree seedlings.
Video.title: Traveling Trees

Video.summary: Huldah Swanson is traveling west to meet her fiancé with $1000 sewn in her hat.
Video.title: The Hat That Huldah Wore

Video.summary: A society woman takes over a wagon train when the wagon master is killed in a raid.
Video.title: Lady of the Plains

Video.summary: A priest claims the marriages in a town are void.
Video.title: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Image.alt: The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled
The Day All Marriages Were Cancelled

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Suspicion over a farm and its female owner creates a rift between two mining partners.
Video.title: The Lady and the Sourdough

Video.summary: After her father is jailed for contempt of court, Kate Melville takes over his job as sheriff.
Video.title: Kate Melville and the Law

Video.summary: The theft of turkeys being brought to market sets up a showdown between lawlessness and justice.
Video.title: The Great Turkey War

Video.summary: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.
Video.title: A Picture of a Lady
